title: Multiple google calendars users sync with monday

posts.author: pittons (pietro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyopne. I have a “problem”.

I would like to synchronize the calendars of the various members with events of monday.
For example (sorry but I’m not english native speaker), if I put that I have a call with X on date Z, i would that on a specific google calendar X and I (members with gmail) are been tagged. Or another possibility, that when i create and event with X and Y tagged, on their google calendar the event appear…

I tried, but I realized that with google accounts this is not possible, is that correct?
